raw_body:
EMAIL US

MAN AND VAN IN NEWHAVEN

Budget man with a van moving service for smaller moves, deliveries and collections. We work throughout Newhaven, Brighton and Hove.

How can we help you today?

Fast, Efficient and Affordable Man and Van in Newhaven

Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage provide a budget man and van service to domestic and commercial customers throughout Newhaven and East Sussex. Whether you are moving offices or moving to a new flat, our experienced and reliable man and van service ensure your move is stress free from beginning to end.

Our man and van service operates throughout the week, Monday to Sunday and we charge no extra for weekend moves. Local to the area, our movers know the fastest routes and come well equipped in case your property or office has restricted access. From individual items being delivered to a full move from a flat, bedsit or student accommodation - our team of professionals work to the same high standards that Mark Ratcliffe Moving & Storage is so well known for.

Fully Equipped Moving Vans

Our man and van offering may be a budget moving option but quality is never compromised. Moving vans all come equipped with:

  • Protective covers for mattresses, sofas and arm chairs
  • Webbing and van tie rails
  • Furniture covers
  • Tool box to assist with furniture assembly
  • Sack truck
  • Loading ramps
  • Tail lifts
  • A variety of boxes
  • Portable wardrobe

Prices

To avoid confusion we break our prices down into two simple options, all are inclusive of VAT and fuel (within local area) and we do not charge any extra for weekend moves: 

Man and Van with working driver - £70 per hour

‍Man and Van with driver only - £50 per hour (you load and unload the van)

Trusted Removal Company in Newhaven

We have been working in the removals industry for over 30 years and pride ourselves on serving Sussex and beyond with a reliable and efficient moving service. Not only do we offer removals and our popular man and van service, we also provide packing, self storage and overseas removals. For more information please contact our team today. We are open Monday to Saturday 08.30 - 17.00 or by appointment for any other time including Sundays. Or, for a free quote, simply click the button at the top of this page.
